---
name: Design Proposal
about: Propose a change to the physical armor design or simulation approach
labels: design
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What improvement does it provide?

## Proposed Design

Detailed description of the change. Include dimensions, materials, and construction details where applicable.

## Impact on Existing System

- [ ] Changes layer stack
- [ ] Changes skeleton geometry
- [ ] Changes bearing rail interface
- [ ] Changes size grading
- [ ] Requires new materials
- [ ] Requires simulation updates

## Testing Plan

How will this change be validated? Include both simulation and physical testing if applicable.

## References

Links to research, prior art, or relevant standards.
